Job_Title: QA Engineer / Software Tester (Based in Ubon Ratchathani)
Full_Description:
Job Title: QA Engineer / Software Tester
Location: Ubon Ratchathani
Reports to: Senior Service Quality Manager

About Us

We are a publicly listed consumer finance company (SET) with a mission to deliver essential financial services to the mass market, grassroots, and underserved communities. Though now an established company, we retain our original startup spirit. We are on a mission to grow 10X over the next decade and are looking for a real doer to join our team.

Our culture is defined by pace and passion. We are a team of doers who learn fast and deliver, and we know our success is powered by our people—our greatest asset. Our team of over 2,500 is fueled by the energy of younger generations, who form the majority with an average age of 28, complemented and guided by the expertise of our experienced Gen Y leaders. We seek innovators who are ready to create and build, not just maintain. We value those who act, deliver, and drive real change.

This action-oriented approach makes collaboration central to our work. We believe strong relationships are built through daily in-person interaction, which is why we operate as a fully in-office team. Our environment is vibrant, agile, and results-driven. While we respect those who seek a comfortable work-life balance, this is not that kind of role. We believe that creating anything truly great requires a level of dedication that mediocrity cannot match. We offer a place where you can accomplish in five years what might take others ten and make a tangible impact.

The Role: The Guardian of Product Excellence

As a QA Engineer, you are the ultimate guardian of our product quality and a critical driver of our development velocity. You will be embedded within an agile team, taking full ownership of the quality strategy and practices. This is not a role for a passive tester; we need a proactive engineer who can design and implement test automation, ensure testing is integrated throughout the development lifecycle, and monitor our products in production to guarantee they meet key business goals. You will be a key partner in enabling your team to deliver high-quality software at speed.

Key Responsibilities

Quality Strategy Ownership: Lead and own the quality strategy for an assigned agile team to ensure the right level of product quality is achieved and maintained.

Agile Quality Practice: Own and champion quality practices within your assigned agile team, ensuring the right level of testing activities is performed alongside product design and implementation.

Test Automation & Collaboration: Define necessary test automation, design automation flows, and share implementation efforts with software engineers to build a robust and efficient testing pipeline.

Production Quality Monitoring: Monitor and ensure each change achieves its business KPIs on production, connecting quality efforts directly to business outcomes.

Velocity and Efficiency: Actively contribute to and drive the development velocity of the agile team, ensuring quality practices accelerate, rather than hinder, delivery.

The Ideal Candidate: A Profile of a Proactive Quality Advocate

We are looking for an engineer with a deep-seated passion for quality and a strong technical aptitude. You are a natural problem-solver who can think critically about a product, identify potential risks, and design smart testing strategies. The ideal candidate is a proactive communicator and collaborator who can work independently, escalate issues effectively, and thrive in a fast-paced agile environment. You see quality not as a final step, but as a shared responsibility that is integral to the entire development process.

Required Qualifications

Educational Background: Bachelor's degree or higher in IT, Computer Science, or a related field.

Professional Experience: 0-2 years of experience in a software development-related field (new graduates with strong potential are welcome).

Technical Skills: Ability to read and code in at least one programming language.

Language Proficiency: Good command of English (Speaking, Writing, and Reading).

Preferred Experience: Experience with test automation tools and strategies is a plus. Experience in Agile Methodology is also an advantage.

Essential Qualities & Skills

Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills: A strong ability to analyze requirements, identify edge cases, and solve complex technical challenges.

Autonomy & Commitment: The ability to work with minimal supervision and a strong commitment to the team’s schedules and goals.

Proactive Issue Resolution: A keen ability to identify and escalate issues in a timely and effective manner.

Strong Communication: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with engineers, product managers, and other stakeholders.

Additional Requirements

This role is based full-time at our Headquarters in Greater Bangkok - Pak Kret.

We need hard workers. We believe that building anything great requires a level of focus and dedication that is incompatible with a conventional "work-life balance." We explicitly reject this mindset because it does not lead to extraordinary outcomes. This is a role for those who are passionate about their work and are willing to dedicate the long hours required for deep, impactful analysis.

Compensation and Benefits

Your actual level and base salary will be determined on a case-by-case basis and may vary based on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience.

The base salary is just one part of your total rewards package. You will also receive access to comprehensive benefits, paid leave, and other company perks, which will be discussed during the interview process.

Equal Opportunity Employer

Our company is an Equal Opportunity Employer; employment is governed on the basis of merit, competence, and qualifications and will not be influenced in any manner by race, religion, gender, disability status, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other legally protected status.

Job Title: IT Manager

Business Unit: Siam Music Yamaha

Directing Report to Managing Director 

Job Purpose

The IT Manager is responsible for leading ERP and digital transformation initiatives, with a primary focus on the end-to-end implementation and continuous improvement of Microsoft Dynamics 365. This role acts as the project owner for ERP programs, ensuring alignment with business strategy, operational excellence, and organizational readiness for transformation in 2026 and beyond.

Key Responsibilities

 

ERP & Digital Transformation Leadership

·         Lead and own end-to-end ERP projects, particularly Microsoft Dynamics 365, covering strategy definition, solution design, development, testing, go-live, and post-implementation support.

·         Define and execute the ERP roadmap aligned with organizational strategy and business priorities.

·         Drive change management initiatives to ensure successful system adoption and user engagement across the organization.

Project Management

·         Manage ERP and IT projects to deliver agreed scope, timeline, budget, and quality.

·         Serve as the primary point of contact between business stakeholders, executive management, IT teams, and external consultants/vendors.

·         Develop and maintain project plans, risk and issue logs, and progress reports for management review.

·         Translate business requirements into clear functional and technical specifications.




ERP Functional & Solution Design

·         Design and apply ERP solutions (Dynamics 365 and JD Edwards EnterpriseOne) across core business processes, including Procurement, Inventory, Sales, Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, and General Ledger.

·         Analyze business needs and recommend optimal system solutions to enhance efficiency and decision-making.

·         Oversee the development of reports, applications, and add-on solutions on Dynamics 365 and JDE, such as inventory movement, inventory aging, and financial reporting.

People Team Lead , Vendor Management

·         Lead, coach, and develop IT and ERP team members to build long-term capability.

·         Plan and conduct user training programs to support effective system utilization.

·         Manage ERP consultants and vendors to ensure delivery in accordance with contracts, SLAs, and project objectives.

Qualifications

·         Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

·         7–10 years of experience in IT and ERP systems, with at least 3 years in ERP project management

·         Good Level in English Communication.

·         Proven experience leading Microsoft Dynamics 365 implementations end-to-end.

·         Strong understanding of ERP-enabled business processes, particularly in Finance, Procurement, Inventory, and Sales.

·         Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

·         Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and strategic decision-making abilities.

       Provident Fund, Co Saving, Funeral Operative

       Group Health & Life Insurance

       Medical Allowances

       Annual Health Check-Up

       Travelling Allowance

       Development Program (SMG Academy)

About the role

Senior ERP Analyst (Infor CloudSuite)

Chromalloy Thailand is looking for a Senior ERP Analyst to play a key role in the implementation, Go‑Live stabilization, and long‑term success of Infor CloudSuite ERP. This is a high‑impact position for ERP professionals who enjoy working closely with business users, IT teams, and global vendors to deliver stable, scalable ERP solutions in a manufacturing environment.

You will be a trusted ERP partner to the business, ensuring system configuration, integrations, reporting, and data integrity fully support operational and strategic goals.

Key Responsibilities

ERP Application & Business Support

Act as a primary functional ERP analyst and point of contact for Infor CloudSuite users

Partner with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into effective ERP solutions

Provide hands‑on support during ERP Go‑Live and post‑Go‑Live stabilization

Coordinate with external ERP vendors and internal IT teams to resolve issues and deliver enhancements

Perform root‑cause analysis and proactively recommend process or system improvements

ERP Configuration, Integration & Data

Support ERP configuration, workflows, and approved customizations aligned with Infor CloudSuite best practices

Coordinate system integrations using Infor ION, APIs, and interface tools

Support data migration, validation, and ongoing data accuracy to ensure system reliability

Use SQL queries and reporting tools for data analysis, troubleshooting, and verification

Reporting & Business Intelligence

Support ERP reporting using Infor Reporting, Birst, IDM, or equivalent tools

Work with business teams to define KPIs and operational reporting requirements

Support dashboards and analytics using Power BI or similar BI platforms

Project & Continuous Improvement

Participate in ERP design workshops, UAT, and Go‑Live readiness activities

Support change management, user documentation, and end‑user training

Identify opportunities for automation, standardization, and process optimization

Provide ongoing ERP application support as part of long‑term IT operations




Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Business Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field

5+ years of experience as an ERP Analyst, ERP Consultant, or Functional ERP Specialist

Hands‑on experience with Infor CloudSuite (LN, M3, SyteLine) or comparable ERP systems

Proven experience supporting ERP implementation or Go‑Live projects, including working with external ERP vendors or system integrators

Strong understanding of ERP business processes, particularly in Manufacturing, Supply Chain, and/or Finance

Experience with ERP configuration, integrations, and workflows (Infor ION and APIs are highly advantageous)

Experience with data migration, data validation, and data quality management

Strong analytical skills with hands‑on experience using SQL queries and ERP reporting tools

Experience with BI and reporting platforms such as Power BI, Birst, Infor Reporting, IDM, or similar tools

Exposure to manufacturing or regulated industries (aerospace, automotive, medical devices) is preferred

Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders

Ability to work under pressure during critical system implementations and business‑critical periods

Good command of English (written and spoken)




What we offer

At Chromalloy (Thailand) Ltd., we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a comprehensive benefits package, including health insurance, provident fund, and opportunities for professional development and career advancement. Full_Description:
TIRD is ambitious. We are building platforms that will serve the entire insurance industry, and we are stretching ourselves to deliver at a standard that matches that responsibility. We already have a delivery team in place — but we know that to go where we want to go, we need experienced leadership that has been there before.




The Head of Delivery is that leader. You will bring the experience, structure, and standards that take a capable team to the next level — establishing the operating model, delivery discipline, and quality culture that industry-grade platforms demand.




This is not a role for someone who maintains what already exists. This is a role for someone who sees the gap between where a team is and where it needs to be — and knows exactly how to close it. You will be accountable for end-to-end delivery outcomes — including product quality, timelines, scalability, and team performance.


Key Responsibilities

1.  Leadership & Team Development

–    Lead, mentor, and elevate a multidisciplinary delivery team spanning software engineering, QA, UX/UI design, and project management.

–    Coach project managers and coordinators on prioritization, stakeholder communication, and delivery accountability — building management capability within the team.

–    Drive a culture of ownership, quality, and continuous improvement across the entire delivery function.

–    Contribute to team expansion including the recruitment of Business Analysts and additional delivery talent as TIRD scales.

2.  Delivery Governance & Execution

–    Own end-to-end delivery of TIRD's technology products and platforms — ensuring work is delivered on time, within scope, and at consistently high quality.

–    Establish delivery governance, accountability frameworks, and quality standards across all projects.

–    Drive clear prioritization and workload visibility across teams.

3.  Delivery Operating Model & Process

–    Design and implement a structured delivery methodology suited to TIRD's context — Agile, Scrum, Kanban, or a well-reasoned hybrid.

–    Establish sprint planning, backlog prioritization, task tracking, and workload management practices — and drive real adoption across the team, not just documentation.

–    Transform existing tools (e.g., Jira) from underutilized software into embedded team habits that provide genuine delivery visibility.

–    Standardize documentation practices including business requirements, functional specifications, and technical design artifacts.

4.  Product Quality & Scalability

–    Raise the quality bar on system design, scalability, and reliability across all platforms — with a focus on making them production-ready and built for industry-wide adoption.

–    Implement QA/testing frameworks, architecture review practices, and structured release management.

–    Champion best practices in software engineering and platform design across the team.

5.  Stakeholder Management

–    Serve as the primary delivery interface with internal teams — Product Management, Data Services, IT, and Client Relationship — ensuring delivery aligns with business priorities.

–    Manage external partner relationships with clarity and professionalism.

–    Communicate delivery status, risks, and plans effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior leadership.

–    Engage confidently with Thai-language stakeholders including OIC, TGIA, and insurance company partners.

–    Partner closely with Product Management to ensure clear prioritization and alignment — with Product owning “what & why” and Delivery owning “how & when”.

6.  Performance & Continuous Improvement

–    Define and track delivery KPIs: timeline adherence, defect rates, system performance, and team productivity.

–    Identify process gaps and drive structured improvement initiatives across delivery and team capabilities.

–    Report delivery health transparently to senior leadership.




Qualifications

Experience

–    10+ years in software delivery, technology development, or IT project management.

–    5+ years leading cross-functional delivery teams (software developers, QA, PM, BA, UX/UI).

–    Demonstrated experience elevating delivery functions — building process, structure, and quality standards in environments that are growing or scaling.

–    Experience delivering platform-based or API-driven products in a regulated or enterprise environment.

Technical & Delivery Skills

–    Strong command of SDLC, Agile/Scrum/Kanban methodologies, and delivery frameworks.

–    Solid understanding of system architecture, APIs, and scalable platform design.

–    Hands-on experience with Jira or equivalent tools — including driving adoption and building process discipline around them, not just configuration.

–    Experience with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines is a plus.

Industry Knowledge

–    Experience in financial services, insurance, or regulated industries is preferred.

–    Familiarity with platform-based systems, data-driven products, or API ecosystems is advantageous.

Soft Skills

–    A builder's mindset: energized by the challenge of creating structure, raising standards, and taking a team further than it has been before.

–    Strong coaching and people development skills — particularly for project managers and delivery leads.

–    Excellent communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

–    Thai language proficiency required; English proficiency required.

–    Able to manage competing priorities in a fast-moving, evolving environment.

Education

–    Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.

–    Master's degree preferred.

Full_Description:
Job Summary:

SOC Analyst L3 and Digital Forensic Investigator is responsible for analyze advanced persistent threat, perform proactive threat hunting, malware analysis and collecting digital forensics artifacts to assist investigations. When investigating, they focus on the forensics capture and analysis of media and network artifacts to reconstruct timelines associated with an identified attack or breach.


Principal Accountabilities:
 

Analyze, investigate and response to advanced persistent threat.

Perform proactive threat hunting and malware analysis.

Providing recommendations for identification, collection and preservation of digital evidence.

Determining tools and procedures required for evidence preservation.

Collecting, processing and analyzing electronically stored information (ESI) obtained from network, cloud and end user digital sources in accordance with industry standards.

Generating formal forensic analysis reports in a clear and concise manner to a non-technical audience, e.g. senior management.

Working with other team members to provide guidance and assistance.

Using industry standard digital forensic tools (e.g. FTK, Axiom) during the course of investigation.

Conducting research into project-related issues.

Maintaining forensic credentials and ability to provide expert testimony.




Qualifications:
 

Bachelor degree in a related field such as information security, management or computer engineering.

Experience in digital forensics and SOC analyst L3.

Active CISSP, CISM and CCE or similar certifications are desirable.

Other relevant certifications (such as GCFA, GCIH, GCIA) are required.

Strong attention to detail, concern for data accuracy and high personal integrity.

In depth experience with industry standard digital forensics methodologies, including: evidence handling, chain of custody procedures, and commonly used forensic toolsets.

Experience using physical, local and remote acquisition tools across multiple OS systems.

Ability to clearly document and communicate findings, opinions, and recommendations to both technical and non-technical audiences.

Good command on both English and Thai

Full_Description:
Data Center Facilities Engineer-Monitoring


Key Responsibilities

1. Monitoring System Architecture & Health

Manage and optimize the BMS/SCADA and EPMS platforms to ensure 100% visibility into mechanical and electrical strings.

Oversee the deployment and calibration of thousands of IoT sensors (thermal, leak detection, vibration, and humidity).

Troubleshoot communication protocols such as Modbus, BACnet, and SNMP to resolve data gaps between field devices and the control room.

2. Real-Time Operations & NOC Integration

Act as the technical lead for the Facilities Operations Center (FOC), defining alarm thresholds to eliminate "alert fatigue" while ensuring critical issues are caught.

Integrate facility telemetry with IT monitoring tools to provide a "full-stack" view of data center health.

Lead the root-cause analysis (RCA) for any telemetry failures or monitoring "blind spots."

3. Data-Driven Efficiency & Power Analysis

Generate automated reports on PUE, WUE, and Carbon Intensity for executive leadership.

Use trend analysis to predict equipment failure (Predictive Maintenance) before a physical threshold is crossed.

Monitor power quality, including total harmonic distortion (THD) and voltage transients, using high-speed EPMS captures.


Qualifications:

Bachelor degree of Engineering, Telecommunication engineering, Electrical Engineering, Control Systems, or Computer Science with a focus on Industrial Automation or related field.

More than 3+ years in data center operations with at least 1 years focused specifically on Controls, Instrumentation, or Monitoring Systems.

Able to work as a team and work in and standby on call on holiday.

Able to work overtime if required and a hotline arrives (Less than 1 hour on site from your home)

Proficiency in English communication is beneficial for both reading and writing.

Working period office time 9:00 - 18:00 and able to standby on call or onsite to work on holiday.

Job_Title: Automotive Designer (CAD, Catia, Blender/3DS Max or similar software-WFH/hybrid)
Full_Description:
Automotive Designer - CAD, Catia, Blender/3DS Max or similar software (work from home initially)



About Us 

We are a 100% USA owned company named Eighty8 Ltd. located at IEAT Ladkrabang, Soi Chalongkrung 31 Lamplatew, Ladkrabang, Bangkok. We are passionate about updating and re-imagining classic European sports cars from 1990 to 2010. We are focused on creating very exclusive, very high performance and very high quality cars both outside and inside. We only use the latest modern technologies in our re-imagination and updates of these cars.

Compensation
Salary ranges will be market or above and based on experience 

This is a work from home position initially for a short period, then in office with a work from home for some days per week or month policy.
 

Summary of Position 
The Automotive Designer (CAD, Catia, Blender/3DS Max, or similar software) will work on design concepts and updates for the exterior and interior of specific european sports cars from 1990-2010. Including all body panels and aerodynamic components. Which can then be used for 3D printing or manufacturing molds. You will also design and implement specified new parts and assemblies with supporting documentation. This role create high quality 3D models of vehicles, both exterior and interior using Blender, 3DS Max, or similar software.

Although primarily a design engineering role, the emphasis is on a project engineering approach to driving projects to completion. This role is expected to impart to coworkers a working knowledge of the automotive industry by working side-by-side with and within our talented teams in a cross-functional manner.
 
Essential Duties 

Qualifications:


Required Education/Experience 
• Graduate in Industrial Design, Transportation Design, Automotive Design, Automotive Engineering, or a related field. 
• 2+ years of experience in design, with experience in automotive or transportation, focusing on accessory components.   
• MUST have experience and be proficient in industry-standard design software such as CAD, Rhino 3D, CATIA or similar NURBS based software plus Blender, 3DS Max or similar.
• Strong portfolio demonstrating proficiency in concept development, sketching, rendering, and 3D modeling. 
• In-depth understanding of automotive design principles, materials, manufacturing processes, and safety standards. 
• Demonstrated ability to think creatively, generate unique design concepts, and pay meticulous attention to details. Aesthetic sensibility and the ability to balance form, function, and market appeal. 
• Good verbal and written communication English skills to effectively articulate design concepts and collaborate with cross-functional teams. Ability to present ideas in a clear and persuasive manner. 
• Strong teamwork and collaboration skills to work effectively in a multidisciplinary environment.  
• Openness to receiving feedback and iterating designs based on stakeholder input. 
• Proven ability to manage multiple design projects simultaneously, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Contribute to a dynamic, collaborative, and positive design environment.


Preferred Education/Experience and/or Certifications 
• Proficiency in Blender software automotive designing is a plus: you are master of blender, wielding its tools with expert precision and pushing its capability to new heights.
• Knowledge of rendering software such as Corio, Vred, KeyShot, or V-Ray is desirable. 
• Understanding of rendering engines (e.g Cycles, Octane) is a plus.

 
Skills/Abilities and Attributes 
• Automotive passion: you have a genuine interest in cars and understand the design principles that make them functional and captivating.

• Design Development: Collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineers, product managers, and marketing professionals to develop and refine design concepts for interior and exterior automotive components. Translate conceptual ideas into tangible designs that meet functional and aesthetic requirements.

• Strong design skill: possess a keen eyes for details and a deep understanding of design principles, including proportion, balance, and composition.

• Sketching and Rendering: Create detailed sketches, renderings, and digital models of interior and exterior automotive designs using industry-standard software tools. Present design proposals to stakeholders for feedback and iteration. 
• 3D Modeling: Utilize computer-aided design (CAD) software to produce accurate and realistic 3D models of automotive components. Ensure design feasibility, manufacturability, and compliance with safety standards. 
• Trend Analysis: Stay updated with the latest trends in automotive design, materials, technology, and consumer preferences. Apply this knowledge to propose innovative design solutions that enhance the overall user experience. 
• Prototype Development: Collaborate with prototyping teams to create physical prototypes of automotive components for evaluation and testing. Work closely with engineers to refine designs based on prototype feedback. 
• Design Documentation: Create comprehensive design documentation including technical drawings, specifications, and design guidelines. Ensure accuracy and clarity of information for manufacturing and production processes. 
• Collaboration and Communication: Effectively communicate design concepts, ideas, and recommendations to team members and stakeholders. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align design objectives and maintain project timelines.




นักออกแบบยานยนต์ - CAD, Catia,Blender, 3DS Max หรือซอฟต์แวร์อื่นที่คล้ายกัน (ทำงานจากที่บ้านในช่วงเริ่มต้น)

เกี่ยวกับเรา

เราคือบริษัท Eighty8 Ltd. ซึ่งเป็นบริษัทที่มีเจ้าของเป็นคนอเมริกัน 100% ตั้งอยู่ที่นิคมอุตสาหกรรมลาดกระบัง ซอยฉลองกรุง 31 แขวงลำปลาทิว เขตลาดกระบัง กรุงเทพฯ เรามีีความชื่นชอบในการอัปเดตและสร้างสรรค์ภาพลักษณ์ใหม่ให้กับรถสปอร์ตยุโรปคลาสสิกในช่วงปี 1990 ถึง 2010 โดยเน้นการสร้างรถยนต์ที่มีความพิเศษเฉพาะตัว มีสมรรถนะสูง และคุณภาพสูงทั้งภายนอกและภายใน เราใช้เทคโนโลยีที่ทันสมัยที่สุดในการออกแบบและอัปเดตรถยนต์เหล่านี้

ค่าตอบแทน
เงินเดือนจะอยู่ในระดับตลาดหรือสูงกว่าตามประสบการณ์


ตำแหน่งนี้เป็นการทำงานจากที่บ้านในช่วงเริ่มต้นเป็นระยะเวลาสั้น ๆ จากนั้นจะทำงานในสำนักงาน พร้อมนโยบายให้ทำงานจากที่บ้านในบางวันต่อสัปดาห์หรือต่อเดือน




สรุปตำแหน่ง
นักออกแบบยานยนต์ (CAD, Catia, Blender, 3DS Max หรือซอฟต์แวร์อื่นที่คล้ายกัน) จะทำงานออกแบบแนวคิดและอัปเดตสำหรับภายนอกและภายในของรถสปอร์ตยุโรปในช่วงปี 1990-2010 รวมถึงชิ้นส่วนภายนอกและชิ้นส่วนแอโรไดนามิก ซึ่งสามารถใช้สำหรับการพิมพ์ 3D หรือการผลิตแม่พิมพ์ นอกจากนี้คุณยังจะได้ออกแบบและดำเนินการสร้างชิ้นส่วนใหม่ ๆ ตามที่กำหนดพร้อมเอกสารสนับสนุน งานนี้จะสร้างโมเดล 3D คุณภาพสูงของรถทั้งภายนอกและภายในโดยใช้ CAD, Catia, Blender, 3DS Max หรือซอฟต์แวร์ที่คล้ายกัน

แม้ว่างานนี้จะเน้นด้านการออกแบบวิศวกรรม แต่ก็ให้ความสำคัญกับการจัดการโครงการในการขับเคลื่อนโครงการให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์ บทบาทนี้จะต้องถ่ายทอดความรู้ด้านอุตสาหกรรมยานยนต์ให้กับเพื่อนร่วมงาน โดยทำงานร่วมกันอย่างใกล้ชิดกับทีมงานที่มีความสามารถของเราในลักษณะข้ามสายงาน

หน้าที่สำคัญ

คุณสมบัติ:

การศึกษา/ประสบการณ์ที่จำเป็น
• จบการศึกษาด้านการออกแบบอุตสาหกรรม การออกแบบการขนส่ง การออกแบบยานยนต์ วิศวกรรมยานยนต์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง
• มีประสบการณ์ 2 ปีขึ้นไปในด้านการออกแบบ โดยเฉพาะอุตสาหกรรมยานยนต์หรือการขนส่ง และในส่วนของชิ้นส่วนเสริม
• ต้องมีประสบการณ์และมีความเชี่ยวชาญในซอฟต์แวร์การออกแบบมาตรฐานอุตสาหกรรม เช่น CAD, Rhino 3D, CATIA or similar NURBS based software plus Blender, 3DS หรือซอฟต์แวร์อื่นที่คล้ายกัน
• มีพอร์ตโฟลิโอที่แสดงถึงความสามารถในการพัฒนาแนวคิด การสเก็ตซ์ การเรนเดอร์ และการสร้างแบบจำลอง 3D
• มีความเข้าใจลึกซึ้งเกี่ยวกับหลักการออกแบบยานยนต์ วัสดุ กระบวนการผลิต และมาตรฐานความปลอดภัย
• สามารถคิดอย่างสร้างสรรค์ สร้างแนวคิดการออกแบบที่ไม่ซ้ำใคร และใส่ใจในรายละเอียดอย่างพิถีพิถัน มีความสามารถในการรักษาสมดุลระหว่างรูปลักษณ์ ฟังก์ชัน และความต้องการของตลาด
• มีทักษะภาษาอังกฤษในการสื่อสารอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพเพื่อถ่ายทอดแนวคิดการออกแบบและทำงานร่วมกับทีมข้ามสายงาน สามารถนำเสนอแนวคิดได้อย่างชัดเจนและน่าสนใจ
• มีทักษะการทำงานเป็นทีมและความร่วมมือที่ดี เพื่อทำงานได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพในสภาพแวดล้อมที่มีหลายสาขาวิชา
• เปิดรับข้อเสนอแนะและสามารถปรับปรุงการออกแบบตามความคิดเห็นของผู้ที่เกี่ยวข้อง
• มีความสามารถในการจัดการโครงการออกแบบหลายโครงการพร้อมกัน จัดลำดับความสำคัญของงาน และตรงตามกำหนดเวลาในสภาพแวดล้อมที่รวดเร็ว

• มีส่วนร่วมในการสร้างสภาพแวดล้อมการออกแบบที่มีความร่วมมือและเป็นบวก

การศึกษา/ประสบการณ์และ/หรือใบรับรองที่ต้องการ
• ความเชี่ยวชาญในการออกแบบยานยนต์ด้วย Blender จะเป็นข้อได้เปรียบ: คุณเชี่ยวชาญใน Blender และสามารถใช้เครื่องมือของมันได้อย่างแม่นยำและดันความสามารถของมันไปให้ถึงขีดสุด
• มีความรู้ในซอฟต์แวร์เรนเดอร์ เช่น Corio, Vred, KeyShot หรือ V-Ray จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ
• ความเข้าใจเกี่ยวกับเอนจิ้นการเรนเดอร์ (เช่น Cycles, Octane) จะเป็นข้อได้เปรียบ

ทักษะ/ความสามารถและคุณลักษณะ
• ความหลงใหลในยานยนต์: คุณมีความสนใจในรถยนต์อย่างแท้จริง และเข้าใจหลักการออกแบบที่ทำให้รถใช้งานได้ดีและน่าดึงดูดใจ
• การพัฒนาแนวคิดการออกแบบ: ทำงานร่วมกับทีมข้ามสายงาน เช่น วิศวกร ผู้จัดการผลิตภัณฑ์ และนักการตลาด เพื่อพัฒนาและปรับปรุงแนวคิดการออกแบบสำหรับชิ้นส่วนยานยนต์ภายในและภายนอก แปลงแนวคิดเป็นการออกแบบที่ตรงตามความต้องการด้านการใช้งานและความสวยงาม
• ทักษะการออกแบบที่แข็งแกร่ง: คุณมีความใส่ใจในรายละเอียดและเข้าใจหลักการออกแบบ เช่น สัดส่วน ความสมดุล และองค์ประกอบ
• การสเก็ตช์และการเรนเดอร์: สร้างสเก็ตช์ที่ละเอียด ภาพเรนเดอร์ และโมเดลดิจิทัลของการออกแบบยานยนต์ทั้งภายในและภายนอก โดยใช้ซอฟต์แวร์มาตรฐานอุตสาหกรรม นำเสนอโครงการออกแบบแก่ผู้มีส่วนได้ส่วนเสียเพื่อรับข้อเสนอแนะและปรับปรุง
• การสร้างแบบจำลอง 3D: ใช้ซอฟต์แวร์ CAD (การออกแบบโดยใช้คอมพิวเตอร์ช่วย) เพื่อสร้างแบบจำลอง 3D ที่แม่นยำและสมจริงของส่วนประกอบยานยนต์ รับรองความสามารถในการผลิต ความเป็นไปได้ในการผลิต และการปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐานความปลอดภัย
• การวิเคราะห์แนวโน้ม: ติดตามแนวโน้มล่าสุดในด้านการออกแบบยานยนต์ วัสดุ เทคโนโลยี และความต้องการของลูกค้าและนำความรู้นี้มาใช้เพื่อเสนอแนวทางการออกแบบที่สร้างสรรค์ซึ่งปรับปรุงประสบการณ์การใช้งาน
• การพัฒนาต้นแบบ: ทำงานร่วมกับทีมต้นแบบเพื่อสร้างต้นแบบทางกายภาพของส่วนประกอบยานยนต์เพื่อการประเมินและการทดสอบ ทำงานร่วมกับวิศวกรอย่างใกล้ชิดเพื่อปรับปรุงการออกแบบตามข้อเสนอแนะจากต้นแบบ
• เอกสารการออกแบบ: สร้างเอกสารการออกแบบที่ครอบคลุม เช่น ภาพวาดทางเทคนิค ข้อกำหนด และแนวทางการออกแบบ รับรองความถูกต้องและความชัดเจนของข้อมูลสำหรับกระบวนการผลิต
• การทำงานร่วมกันและการสื่อสาร: สื่อสารแนวคิดการออกแบบ ข้อเสนอแนะ และข้อแนะนำกับทีมงานและผู้เกี่ยวข้องอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

Responsibilities

1. System Design & Execution

Architectural Design: Responsible for designing project-level architectures, focusing on High-level Design (HLD).

Detailed Documentation: Oversee the creation of Low-level Design (LLD) to ensure the Software Development team can implement solutions with high precision and technical accuracy.

2. Technical Architecture Governance & Integration

Orchestrate and Ensure Integration Quality: Define and oversee the design of data orchestration between internal and external entities, ensuring technical excellence, high performance, and robust security.

Architectural Validation & Compliance: Perform architectural reviews and validate system designs from internal teams and vendors to ensure alignment with Enterprise Architecture frameworks and practical implementation of PDPA/Security standards.

3. Practical Innovation & PoC

Proof of Concept (PoC): Execute Proof of Concept initiatives for emerging technologies to evaluate their feasibility and business value.

System Optimization: Provide strategic recommendations for system performance improvements to enhance processing power and future scalability.

4. Development Support & Risk Management

Technical Problem Solving: Partner closely with the Software Development team to resolve complex technical challenges, including Technical Debt and system bottlenecks.

Risk Mitigation: Assess and manage technical risks at the project level, developing proactive prevention plans to ensure business continuity and minimize operational impact.

5. Team & Stakeholder Support

Team Management: Manage the internal operations and deliverables of the Solution Architecture team to ensure all outputs are met according to the project roadmap.

Stakeholder Engagement: Coordinate with Business Units at the operational level to gather detailed requirements and translate them into effective, business-aligned technical solutions.

Job Summary:

The SOC Analyst L2 provides 24x7 eyes-on-glass service; formed from a team of security analysts with some years of experience. The monitoring and identification tier are responsible for the real-time monitoring and identification of security incidents. Analysts staffed at Level 2 monitor the MDR Centre main channel event streams within the MDR Centre security information and event management (SIEM) platform and other MDR Centre tools. They identify suspicious activity, open an incident investigation and perform preliminary investigation to validate the incident. If the incident is determined to be more complex and requires more time and/or deeper expertise to analyze, the Tier 2 – Analyst will transfer the open investigation to Tier 3 for further analysis and escalation.

SOC Analyst is also responsible for providing a combination of strategic, tactical and operational intelligence to the MDR Centre and its constituency.  They gather and analyze tactical cyber threat and vulnerabilities intelligence and provide timely intelligence support to incident responders and guidance to threat hunter.

In addition, Cyber Security Analyst Tier 2 is responsible for the validation and analysis of investigations passed up from Tier 1 analysts. Tier 2 incident responder and investigator will complete the documentation of the investigation, determine the validity and priority of the activity and escalate to the SOC Manager.




Principal Accountabilities:
 

Performs real-time monitoring of security alerts generated by various MDR tools deployed by True Digital.

Investigates potential security incidents under the guidance of playbooks and procedures.

Analyses and assesses security alerts.

Validates, classifies and opens security incident cases or escalates to Level 2 analysts.

Serves as a primary contact point for reporting potential security incidents.

Document security incidents as identified by the case management process.

Provides feedback on enhancing the operations of the cyber security operations centre.

Responds to security alerts generate within the SLA time window.

Establishes priority intelligence requirements for all key stakeholders.

Demonstrates an understanding of business processes, risk management, and related standards and regulatory requirements.

Performs threat modeling to identify, classify, prioritize and rate threats based on thorough analysis of the organization’s top risks and critical assets, and derive appropriate use cases to be implemented into the MDR platform.

Investigates and researches known indicators, correlate events, identify malicious activity, and discover new sources to provide early warning for a variety of threats.

Analyzes internal and external threat intelligence data sets, including vulnerabilities intelligence, detect and track emerging threats and security trends.

Produces timely, accurate, relevant and predictive intelligence by identifying and reporting on malicious actors, campaigns, and other relevant activities. 

Produce and deliver timely, actionable threat intelligence to foster situational awareness, enables proactive decision-making, and promote enhance active defense measures within True Digital.

Monitors open source information feeds and threat actor activity to identify activity levels and indicators for threats, targets of interest and possible attack vectors.

Work with the other MDR Centre team to ensure that actionable indicators of compromise are incorporated into appropriate technologies.




Qualifications:
 

Bachelor degree in a related field such as information security, computer science or computer engineering.

Minimum of 3-5 years of experience in cybersecurity, with a focus on security operations and incident response.

Strong understanding of security technologies, including SIEM, IDS/IPS, firewalls, and security analytics tools.

Hands-on experience with security analysis tools and techniques, such as malware analysis, network forensics, and threat hunting.

Knowledge of industry frameworks and best practices, such as NIST, ISO, and CIS.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities.

Ability to work well under pressure and handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

Relevant security certifications, such as GCIA, GCIH, or equivalent, are highly desirable.

Good command on both English and Thai.

Level:                           Deputy Department Manager
Work location:           Bangkok (SM Tower Building), Monday - Friday: Onsite

Job Purpose:
The Business Analyst is an impact role responsible for bridging the gap between business needs and technical solutions. This role plays a pivotal part in analyzing business processes, identifying opportunities for improvement, and translating requirements into actionable plans for project teams.

Job Responsibilities:
1. Requirements Elicitation and Documentation
   - Collaborate with stakeholders to gather, analyze, and document business requirements.
   - Conduct interviews, workshops, and surveys to understand business needs.
   - Translate high-level business goals into detailed functional and non-functional requirements.
   - Create comprehensive requirement specifications, use cases, and user stories.
2. Business Process Analysis
   - Analyze current business processes to identify inefficiencies and areas for improvement.
   - Model and document existing and proposed business processes using techniques such as BPMN.
   - Collaborate with process owners to streamline workflows and optimize operations.
3. Data Analysis and Reporting
   - Analyze data to identify trends, patterns, and insights that support decision-making.
   - Develop and maintain reports, dashboards, and data visualizations.
4. Solution Evaluation and Recommendation
   - Evaluate potential solutions and technologies to address business challenges.
   - Provide recommendations based on cost-benefit analysis and alignment with business goals.
   - Collaborate with IT teams to ensure proposed solutions meet technical requirements.
5. Change Management and Stakeholder Communication
   - Act as a liaison between business stakeholders and project teams.
   - Manage change requests and communicate changes to all relevant parties.
   - Facilitate communication and collaboration among project stakeholders.
   - Assist in the development of change management plans.
6. Testing and Quality Assurance
   - Support in developing test plans and test cases based on business requirements.
   - Participate in user acceptance testing (UAT) and quality assurance processes.
   - Ensure that delivered solutions meet the specified requirements.
7. Documentation and Training
   - Create user manuals, training materials, and documentation for end-users.
   - Involved in conducting training sessions and workshops for end-users.
   - Ensure end-users are proficient in using new systems and processes.

Education/Training Qualifications:
- Bachelor's or master's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Business, Information Technology).

Experience:
- 5 to 10 years of experience in business analysis or related roles.
- Strong proficiency in requirement elicitation and documentation.
- Experience with business process modeling and data analysis.
 - Knowledge of SAP EWM/WM is a plus
